description_long: This object is a modern cash register with a robust, rectangular body primarily finished in a dark, glossy material. The front features a recessed area with a green-tinted surface, likely representing a touch-sensitive interface or illuminated tray. At the top rear, a prominent display screen is mounted, framed in a metallic or plastic bezel, and angled for easy viewing by the operator. The sides are solid and blocky, with the left and right profiles showing the depth and thickness of the structure. The back is mostly featureless, emphasizing the solid construction, while the front is clearly designed for user interaction. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in retail or service environments.
description: A sleek, dark-colored cash register with a green-lit interface and a prominent display screen, designed for modern retail use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green-lit interface area and the main display screen above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the register, with the display screen visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, featureless back and the top of the display screen.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the green-lit interface.
